title: Evangelion Clips
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Clips             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Wed Jan 25, 2012 9:04 pm Okay, I figured I might as well post this thread for people to archive various clips from Evangelion for research use in the various threads that pop up on this forum. On that note, I have to ask if anyone has a copy of Gendo's Soliloquy from End of Evangelion .

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Thu Jan 26, 2012 2:10 am I found your request on youtube, but there are no subtitles, and the quality of the picture becomes very poor in some parts: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3ydIkpq71ZU In place of the absent subtitles, here is a translation of the scene in question. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion Clips             Quote Post by TomasJC » Fri Jan 27, 2012 5:58 pm Cody MacArthur Fett wrote: Okay, I figured I might as well post this thread for people to archive various clips from Evangelion for research use in the various threads that pop up on this forum. On that note, I have to ask if anyone has a copy of Gendo's Soliloquy from End of Evangelion .

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sat Jan 28, 2012 1:26 am I don't know if this might help but i hope so: [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xtXaKsd7jm4&feature=related[/url] It's the finale of EoTV, from a little seconds after the alternate reality to the end. Some things in the subtitle i don't like but overall i feel it is a pretty good copy. Hope this might help.
